coastal.title: Truck brings down power lines, starts small brush fire on Malahat
coastal.description: The incident occurred at approximately 3:40 p.m. on July 9. Shawnigan Lake RCMP responded to the area of South Shawnigan Lake Road and the Trans-Canada Highway.

southeast.title: Evacuation alert for East Kootenay wildfire, Brunswick Creek fire grows: officials
southeast.description: The BC Wildfire Service is issuing a call for compliance, as two out-of-control wildfires continue to burn in the Fraser Canyon.

southeast.title: Fraser Canyon wildfires continue to threaten residents, property
southeast.description: The Ainslie Creek fire is now estimated to be more than 15,500 hectares in size, and the Brunswick Creek fire across the river is now at an estimated 2,600 hectares.

all.title: B.C. wildfires 2026: Live map shows fires burning, locations and evacuations
all.description: This B.C. wildfire map shows you where fires are burning in the province, how big they are and if there are any evacuation alerts or orders with the wildfires.
